error_signature: binary files may be lost between the webhook and the HTTP Request node
title: Binary data loss in HTTP Request node in n8n v2
symptom: When executing a workflow that involves binary data, the HTTP Request node fails to process the data correctly in n8n v2, resulting in an error. This issue does not occur in n8n v1.
applies_when: Deploying on Railway without shared persistent storage
root_cause: In n8n v2, the execution model changed to a distributed architecture, which requires binary data to survive serialization and worker execution. Without shared persistent storage, binary files may be lost between nodes, leading to errors.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable EXECUTIONS_MODE to 'regular'.
agent_instruction: Configure the environment variables as specified to handle binary data correctly.
